title: Dark GUI - BetterVanillaBuilding addon
description: A BetterVanillaBuilding addon to make the inventories dark themed.
body:
A BetterVanillaBuilding addon to make all gui dark. You will not be blinded ever again by the bright inventories.

#### BetterVanillaBuilding [Download](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bettervanillabuilding)
#### Offcial BetterVanillaBuilding [website](https://bettervanillabuilding.com)

Huge shout out to [stefanJ2](https://modrinth.com/user/stefanJ2) for making the whole BetterVanillabuilding Texture Pack and giving opportunities to fans to contribute to the community.

If you are enjoying the pack check out [Bright Ores for BVB](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bright-ores)
